ProductsPage.title: Products
ProductsPage.subtitle: Two product lines — custom-cut domestic timber and certified Swedish C24 structural timber

softwood.title: Custom-Cut Domestic Timber
softwood.desc1: Pine and spruce from Polish state forests, processed on-site with our TrakMet band saw. Every piece hand-cut to millimetre accuracy — no production-line tolerances.
softwood.desc2: We produce structural beams up to 11.5 m in length, battens, boards, rafters and planed elements. Orders accepted in any cross-section — any dimension to customer specification.
softwood.desc3: Standard orders are completed within one working day. Flexibility and fast turnaround are our advantage over network suppliers.

swedish.title: Swedish Structural Timber C24
swedish.desc1: We import certified C24 grade timber from Sweden — kiln-dried, straight and ready to build with. It comes from Södra, a Swedish forestry cooperative representing over 50,000 forest owners.
swedish.desc2: C24 timber meets EN 338 and has a characteristic bending strength of 24 MPa. A higher standard than domestic timber — required by most structural projects.
swedish.desc3: Ideal applications: roof trusses, floor joists, load-bearing walls and structural frames. Every piece marked with green Södra tags and red C24 grade stamps.

c24.title: What Does C24 Grade Mean?
c24.content1: C24 is a European structural strength grade for softwood timber, defined by EN 338. The letter C stands for conifer, and 24 indicates a characteristic bending strength of 24 MPa.
c24.content2: The classification is based on timber strength, stiffness and density. C24 timber is graded visually and mechanically, ensuring consistent quality. It is used wherever calculated structural load-bearing capacity is required.
c24.content3: Typical applications: roof trusses, floor beams, load-bearing walls, columns and frame elements. Designers and building inspectors increasingly require documented timber grade.
c24.badgesDesc: Every piece of Södra timber bears two markings: a green Södra brand tag (proof of Swedish origin and kiln-drying) and a red C24 grade stamp (structural strength certificate to EN 338).

AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.subtitle: A family sawmill from Mazovia — construction timber with passion since 2007

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Tartak-Budrol is part of the Bud-Rol group, founded by Jarosław Dobkowski in 2007. We started as a local sawmill in Skarżyn near Płońsk in the Mazovian region — a small business serving local builders and individual investors.
story.p2: Over the years we expanded our operation: from basic log processing to a full range of construction timber. In response to growing market demands, we partnered with Södra — a Swedish forestry cooperative — and began importing certified C24 structural grade timber.
story.p3: Today we serve both individual customers and contracting firms across Płońsk County and the surrounding area. We combine local craft traditions with European quality standards.

equipment.title: Equipment
equipment.content: Our TrakMet band saw cuts with millimetre precision. We process logs up to 11.5 m in length and produce beams, battens, boards and planed elements in any cross-section. We fulfil non-standard orders — any dimension to customer specification.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.c24: The C24 grade is a European structural timber strength standard defined by EN 338. The number indicates a characteristic bending strength of 24 MPa. C24 timber is required in structural projects — roof trusses, floor joists and load-bearing walls.
certifications.sodra: Södra is a Swedish forestry cooperative representing over 50,000 forest owners. Our timber comes exclusively from Södra's certified forests, is kiln-dried and marked with green brand tags and red C24 grade stamps visible on every piece.

services.title: Additional Services
services.items: We offer: roof structure design assistance, collaboration with partner carpentry firms, and immersion impregnation for garden and terrace timber.

owners.alt: Owners of Tartak-Budrol — Jarosław Dobkowski and his wife

hero.headline: Construction timber cut to size
hero.subheading: Tartak Płońsk — own sawmill, Swedish imports, impregnation

cutting.title: Custom cutting
cutting.desc: We cut logs into boards, beams and battens to your specification. Orders are completed within one working day. Every piece measured by hand — no production-line tolerances.

timber.title: Swedish timber
timber.desc: We import certified C24 timber from Sweden — straight, dry and ready to build with. A higher standard than domestic timber, required by most structural projects.

impregnation.title: Impregnation
impregnation.desc: We protect wood by vacuum-pressure treatment against fungi, insects and moisture. The service is available on-site at the sawmill — ideal for garden and terrace timber.

softwood.title: Domestic timber cut to size
softwood.descLine1: Pine and spruce from Polish forests, cut to customer specification.
softwood.descLine2: Available off-the-shelf or made to order in any cross-section.

swedish.title: Swedish C24 timber
swedish.descLine1: Certified structural timber imported directly from Sweden.
swedish.descLine2: Ideal for roof trusses, ceilings and load-bearing structures.

cta.title: Need a quote?
cta.desc: Contact us — we will respond within 24 hours

footer.description: Sawmill and timber yard in Płońsk. Custom-cut domestic softwood and certified Swedish C24 structural timber.

controller.title: 1. Data Controller
controller.content: The data controller is Jarosław Dobkowski, conducting business under the name Bud-Rol Dobkowski J., based at Skarżyn, ul. Wyszogrodzka 2, 09-100 Płońsk, Poland. For data protection enquiries, contact: biuro@bud-rol.com.pl

dataCollected.title: 2. Data We Collect
dataCollected.content: We collect personal data you voluntarily provide: name, phone number, and email address when submitting a quote request. We also collect technical data: IP address, browser type, device information via cookies — only after you give your consent.

purpose.title: 3. Purpose of Processing
purpose.content: Your data is processed to: (a) respond to quote requests and other enquiries, (b) provide customer service, (c) with your consent, for website analytics (Google Analytics 4) and advertising measurement (Meta Pixel).

legalBasis.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.content: Processing is based on: (a) your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) for contact form submission and analytics cookies, (b) legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR) for responding to business enquiries and ensuring website security.

retention.title: 5. Retention Period
retention.content: Quote request data is retained for 2 years from the date of last contact. Analytics data is retained according to Google Analytics and Meta default retention periods. You may request earlier deletion at any time.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.content: Under GDPR, you have the right to: (1) access your data, (2) rectify inaccurate data, (3) erase your data (right to be forgotten), (4) restrict processing, (5) data portability, (6) object to processing. To exercise these rights, contact us: biuro@bud-rol.com.pl

authority.title: 7. Right to Lodge a Complaint
authority.content: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority: Urząd Ochrony Danych Osobowych (UODO), ul. Stawki 2, 00-193 Warsaw, Poland. Website: uodo.gov.pl

cookies.title: 8. Cookies
cookies.content: This website uses cookies. Essential cookies are required for the website to function. Analytics cookies (Google Analytics 4) and advertising cookies (Meta Pixel) are loaded only after you give explicit consent via the cookie banner. You can change your cookie preferences at any time.

contact.title: 9. Data Protection Contact
contact.content: For data protection enquiries, contact us at: biuro@bud-rol.com.pl or in writing: Bud-Rol Dobkowski J., Skarżyn, ul. Wyszogrodzka 2, 09-100 Płońsk, Poland.

OStroniePage.title: About this site
OStroniePage.subtitle: Learn how the Tartak Budrol website was built and how Facebook ads can bring new customers to your business.
OStroniePage.intro: Designed and built by Phil Parry — a British digital designer living in Poland with over 25 years of experience in the corporate world, including leading design systems at Orange. It's a privilege to bring that expertise to the local business community. This site is part of a growing portfolio, showcasing what's possible for small and medium-sized businesses at a fraction of the cost of a traditional agency.

about.heading: How was this website built?
about.p1: This website loads in an instant on any phone — even with a slow connection. Instead of heavy, slow pages, we built it using ready-made HTML files that the server delivers immediately without any processing. Images are automatically resized to match your screen, so there is no waiting.
about.p2: The site is available in three languages: Polish, English and Ukrainian. Customers from different countries can browse the offer in their own language. The language switcher is visible from every page.
about.p3: The quote form sends an instant notification to the owner's phone the moment a customer submits it. No emails to miss in a busy inbox — the message arrives directly. Customer data (name, phone, timber dimensions) is stored securely.
about.p4: Google can easily find this site when someone searches for 'sawmill Plonsk' or 'construction timber Mazovia'. The site includes proper descriptions, tags and sitemaps that help the search engine understand what the business does.

speed.title: Fast loading
speed.desc: Ready-made HTML files + optimised images. The site opens in under a second on any phone.

languages.title: Three languages
languages.desc: Polish, English and Ukrainian. Every customer can use the site in their own language without difficulty.

quotes.title: Quote form
quotes.desc: The customer fills in the form, the owner gets a notification on their phone. Simple and fast.

seo.title: Google visibility
seo.desc: The site is optimised for local search phrases — 'sawmill Plonsk', 'C24 timber', 'timber cut to size'.

aeo.title: AEO — Answer Engine Optimisation
aeo.desc: AI assistants like ChatGPT, Perplexity and Google AI now answer questions directly. This site uses structured data and content formatting so that AI engines can find, understand and cite the business — not just Google, but the next generation of search.

fbAds.title: Facebook ad campaigns
fbAds.desc: Ready-to-launch ad campaigns targeting homebuilders, renovators and construction crews in the Płońsk area. Each campaign drives potential customers straight to the quote form.

ads.heading: Example Facebook ad campaigns
ads.intro: Below are three example ad campaigns that can be launched to bring new customers from Facebook directly to the quote form. Each campaign targets a different audience.

campaign1.name: Building a home in Plonsk district
campaign1.audience: Men/women aged 30–55, radius 30 km from Plonsk, interests: home construction, building materials

campaign2.name: Renovation season — timber cut to size
campaign2.audience: Homeowners aged 25–60, Mazovia region, interests: renovation, DIY, home improvement
campaign2.objective: Traffic + conversion — website visits with quote form

campaign3.name: Building crews — C24 Södra structural timber
campaign3.audience: Construction company owners, Plonsk district, interests: timber trade, construction materials
campaign3.objective: Conversion — direct quote requests from professionals

AdExamplesPage.title: Facebook Ad Examples
AdExamplesPage.subtitle: See what real Facebook ads for Tartak-Budrol could look like. Each campaign targets a different customer segment with tailored messaging.

homebuilders1.copy: Building a house near Płońsk? Get certified C24 structural timber delivered straight to your site. Swedish quality, local service — request a free quote today.
homebuilders1.headline: Certified C24 timber for your build
homebuilders1.description: Free quote · Delivery to Płońsk district
homebuilders1.target: People aged 30–55 building a home within 30 km of Płońsk
homebuilders1.why: Catches homebuilders at the moment they need structural timber — the offer of site delivery removes a major friction point

homebuilders2.copy: Building a roof? We supply complete timber packages for roof trusses — rafters, wall plates, collars and battens. One order, one delivery — no running between stores.
homebuilders2.headline: Complete roof timber from one source
homebuilders2.target: Individual homebuilders at the roofing stage, within 30 km of Płońsk
homebuilders2.why: Offers a ready-made package instead of individual items — saves time and logistics headaches for the homebuilder

homebuilders3.copy: Not sure how much timber you need? Send us your plans — we'll calculate quantities, select dimensions and quote for free. No obligation.
homebuilders3.headline: Free timber calculation for your project
homebuilders3.description: Send your plans · Get a free quote
homebuilders3.target: People planning a house build who have plans but don't know how much timber to order
homebuilders3.why: Lowers the barrier to entry — the customer doesn't need to be a timber expert, they just need their building plans

renovators1.copy: Renovation season is here! Need timber cut to your exact measurements? We cut to size on the same day. No minimum order — from a single plank to a full load.
renovators1.headline: Custom-cut timber, same-day service
renovators1.description: Cut to size · No minimum order
renovators1.target: Homeowners aged 25–60 in the Mazovia region interested in DIY and renovation
renovators1.why: Taps into seasonal renovation demand — the same-day cutting promise differentiates from big-box stores

renovators2.copy: Planning a deck or fence? We have pressure-treated timber, deck boards and fence posts — ready to install. Delivered to your door.
renovators2.headline: Deck & fence timber — ready to install
renovators2.target: Homeowners with gardens aged 30–55, spring/summer season
renovators2.why: Taps into seasonal trends — spring is peak demand for decking and fencing projects

renovators3.copy: Building shelves, a wardrobe or furniture? Need 3 boards, not 30? Order as little as you want, in any size you need. Cut in 15 minutes.
renovators3.headline: Timber for small projects — no minimum order
renovators3.target: DIY enthusiasts and hobbyists, men aged 25–45 in the Mazovia region
renovators3.why: Addresses the big-box store frustration — there you buy full packs, here you order exactly what you need

pros1.copy: Construction pros: certified Södra C24 structural beams — inspector-approved, delivered on schedule. Consistent stock, trade pricing. Call or request a quote online.
pros1.headline: Södra C24 beams — trade pricing
pros1.target: Construction company owners and crew leaders in the Płońsk district
pros1.why: Speaks directly to professionals who value certification, reliable supply, and trade-level pricing over everything else

pros2.copy: Build regularly? Open a trade account — fixed pricing, deliveries on call, invoicing with deferred payment. Join 20+ companies already working with us.
pros2.headline: Trade account — fixed prices, fast delivery
pros2.description: Deferred payment · On-call delivery · Fixed pricing
pros2.target: Construction companies completing 3+ projects per year in the Mazovia region
pros2.why: Builds loyalty — a trade account with deferred payment is the industry standard for professionals, served on a silver platter

pros3.copy: Need timber for an entire project? From foundations to roof — floor joists, rafters, battens, formwork boards. One order, one invoice, on-time site delivery.
pros3.headline: Full project supply — one order
pros3.target: Site managers overseeing residential house construction projects
pros3.why: Prioritises convenience — one supplier instead of three, one contact, one invoice. Saves the site manager's time

GoLivePage.title: Getting Your Website Live
GoLivePage.subtitle: A simple 4-step process to move your finished website from our development server to your own domain.

cta.title: Shared To-Do List
cta.description: We are using a shared Google Document to track all the tasks needed to get the website live. Open it to see the current status and any items that need your input.

phase1.title: Domain Setup
phase1.item1: Find out where tartakplonsk.pl is registered (which company)
phase1.item2: Log in to the domain panel and update the DNS settings Phil sends you
phase1.item3: Or: share the login with Phil and he will do it for you

phase2.title: Hosting Setup
phase2.item1: Set up free hosting on Google Firebase
phase2.item2: Connect the domain to the new hosting
phase2.item3: Security certificate (HTTPS padlock) is applied automatically

phase3.title: Final Checks
phase3.item1: Verify the quote request form sends emails correctly
phase3.item2: Confirm all pages load in Polish, English & Ukrainian
phase3.item3: Test on mobile phones and desktop computers

domain.needSub: To connect the domain, we need a few things from your side.
domain.q1Body: Which company manages it? (e.g. home.pl, OVH, nazwa.pl, cyber_Folks)
domain.q2Body: Either share the login details with Phil, or be ready to paste in 2 DNS records that Phil will send you
domain.q3Body: Exact street address, opening hours, and a Google Maps pin for the sawmill location
domain.needNote: If you are unsure about any of these, Phil can walk you through it step by step.
domain.dnsTitle: What the DNS change looks like
domain.dnsSub: This is what you (or Phil) will do in the domain panel. It takes about 5 minutes.
domain.dns1: Log in to your domain registrar (the company where you bought tartakplonsk.pl)
domain.dns2: Find the DNS settings page (sometimes called "DNS zone" or "domain records")
domain.dns3: Add or update the A record — Phil will give you the exact IP address to enter
domain.dns4: Add a TXT record — Phil will give you the exact text to paste in
domain.dns5: Save. The change takes effect within a few hours (sometimes up to 24h)
domain.dnsNote: Phil will send the exact values to copy and paste. You do not need to guess anything.

hosting.title: Hosting (free)
hosting.sub: Where the website lives on the internet
hosting.item1: Google provides a generous free quota for small websites
hosting.item2: Your site fits comfortably within it
hosting.item3: If traffic grows significantly or you add advanced features, there may be a cost — but only when those extras are added

database.title: Database (free)
database.sub: Storing customer emails and quote requests
database.item1: A simple database can be added to store customer contact information and quote requests
database.item2: Makes it easy to follow up and keep a record of enquiries
database.item3: Free tier is more than enough for this site

seo.title: SEO & AEO
seo.sub: Helping customers find you on Google and AI search
seo.body: Search engine optimisation is an ongoing exercise. Phil can regularly update the website so it ranks well on Google and appears in AI-powered search results.
seo.item3: Structured data for AI search engines

ads.title: Advertising
ads.sub: Promoting the website to reach more customers
ads.body: Once the site is live, we can discuss how you would like to promote it. Options include:
ads.item2: Google Ads (people searching for timber / sawmill)
